title: Due-diligence hub → Tempus tracker
question: Can mixed-reliability sources become a verified, refreshable single-name read? *(tracked name: Tempus, TEM)*
finding: A **living** single-name tracker: Tempus price / drawdown / relative-strength since IPO + a sourced idea ledger (Signatera-MRD adoption, biopharma data-licensing, path to EBITDA breakeven) grounded in the note record. Refreshable; honest that social coverage is nil and news thin.
